since_last: 10% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.04%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 10% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.64% · Gold -1.78% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 10% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.04%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.04%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.05%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.05%, BIDU +4.51%, AVAV +2.28%, SPCX +0.89%, ISRG +0.40%. Laggards: MGNI -4.14%, SYNA -3.56%, MU -3.54%, LSCC -3.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.89% at $150.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
